input.background: For each of the following comparisons, plot the data as back-to-back stemplots on a common stem. Then, compare group locations and spreads.
input.question: (a) Comparison A: Group 1: 90, 70, 50, 30, 10; Group 2: 70, 60, 50, 40

output.answer: Comparison A. Groups have the same central locations; group 1 has greater variability (spread).

Group1.description: Values of Group 1 used for comparison in the stemplot.

Group2.description: Values of Group 2 used for comparison in the stemplot.
